name: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026
_refined: 2026-06-27: rooms, tracks, dates refined from the first real ingest of source_url (556 events). Removed phantom 2026-07-02; replaced inferred track/room placeholders with the program's actual values.
_dates_note: The program markdown's header claims '5 days' but only 4 are actually scheduled. Config previously listed a 5th date (2026-07-02 'Sessions Day 4') with no program content; removed after ingest confirmed no Day 5 sessions exist.
_comment_rooms: The 18 rooms/stages actually observed in the program's [room] tags after ingest. An event record's room must match one of these (or be null).
_comment_tracks: The actual named tracks from the program's ## Tracks section (39 across days 2-4; union deduped below; Day 1 is hands-on workshops across all tracks with no track table). These are NOT the clustering -- conf-theme-cartographer derives themes independently and may cut across these. Tracks are weak priors / labels only.

travel_time_matrix._comment: Minutes to move between rooms in Moscone West. Default 5 min; overrides capture longer hops (Expo floor to Main Stage). Keys are 'RoomA|RoomB' (symmetric).

default_objective_weights._comment: DEFAULTS only. conf-preference-elicitor elicits the attendee's actual weights into profile.json; the optimizer uses THOSE, never these. Provided so a smoke-test run has something to use.

workshop.note: workshops/labs typically require registration and may fill

recorded_policy.note: The program does not state recording status per session. Treat recorded=unknown talks as POTENTIALLY skippable when they overlap a higher-priority, capacity-constrained, or non-recorded session. Update this if the conference publishes a recording policy.
